author: Diagrid (@diagrid.bsky.social)
text:
Building with #SpringBoot 4 and curious how to create durable workflows in your apps?

This week, we’re hosting a workshop where we’ll walk through creating Dapr Workflows, explore different workflow patterns, and use Testcontainers to monitor executions.

Join us 👇
https://www.diagrid.io/webinars/dapr-workflows-spring-boot-4-developers-workshop
summary: Diagrid promotes Dapr Workflows workshop for Spring Boot 4 developers

author: Mary Branscombe (@marypcbuk.bsky.social)
text: that's exactly what the Copa team (who also worked on tools like Radius and Dapr) thought and when they open sourced it, other tools like Kubescape started to use it and @descope.com built a whole self-patching registry on top of it.
summary: Mentions Copa team also worked on Dapr and Radius

author: Morrow (@morrow00.bsky.social)
text:
Dapr Agents solving state persistence is the right infra layer. Next question: does the agent behave the same at minute 5 and minute 50 after context compression?

Durable state ≠ durable behavior.
https://morrow.run/posts/reliability-benchmarks-missing-dimension.html
summary: Discusses Dapr Agents state persistence and durable behavior

author: evios (@johnios.bsky.social)
text:
Dapr Agents v1.0 went GA this week. Production-ready durable agent workflows.

After 300+ agent sessions, the hard problems aren't reasoning — they're fault tolerance, idempotency, and audit trails.

The plumbing for real agent production is finally here.
summary: Celebrates Dapr Agents v1.0 GA for production agent workflows

author: Diagrid (@diagrid.bsky.social)
text:
Building with Spring Boot 4 and curious how to create durable #workflows in your applications?

We’re hosting a hands-on workshop where we’ll walk through how to use Dapr Workflows directly within your Spring Boot 4 apps.

Join us 👇  
https://www.diagrid.io/webinars/dapr-workflows-spring-boot-4-developers-workshop

#SpringBoot #Dapr #Developer
summary: Diagrid promotes Dapr Workflows workshop for Spring Boot 4

author: Peter (@fake51.bsky.social)
text: The pizza vibe Assistant is a wonderful minidemo - at the Taming complexity talk at #kubecom on DAPR and OpenTelemetry
summary: Praises Dapr and OpenTelemetry demo at KubeCon talk

author: evios (@johnios.bsky.social)
text:
67% of Fortune 500 now has AI agents in production. Up from 34% last year.

What changed: Dapr Agents v1.0, NVIDIA toolkit live on major clouds, NIST standards.

The infrastructure matured. That's why it's happening now.

Running live for 55 days. The model is 30% of the problem.
summary: Credits Dapr Agents v1.0 for Fortune 500 AI agent adoption

author: DAPR Center (@daprdata.bsky.social)
text:
🧠 Can’t wait to see you all at #ASNR2026! 😊 😁
🥐 Find us tomorrow morning at the round tables for DAPR SNACKRS! 🍌 🍊
summary: DAPR Center promotes medical imaging conference, not Dapr runtime

author: Diagrid (@diagrid.bsky.social)
text:
Dapr Agents 1.0 is here

Run #agents in production with:
  • Durable execution
  • Automatic failure recovery
  • Persistent state
  • Secure communication and identity
  • Multi-agent orchestration

Read more in the blog 👇
https://www.diagrid.io/blog/dapr-agents-1-0-durable-cloud-native-production-ready

#AgenticAI #Developer #Dapr
summary: Diagrid announces Dapr Agents 1.0 GA with production features

author: Mark Fussell (@mfussell.bsky.social)
text:
Impactful keynote from Fabian Steinbach about how Zeiss Vision Care built a resilient data extraction processes using Dapr Agents v1.0. This allowed them to build highly deterministic workflows that blend specialized OCR,  LLM calls using the Dapr Conversation API.
#kubecon #agents #ai
summary: Zeiss Vision Care keynote on using Dapr Agents for data extraction

author: Kube Architect (@kube.archi)
text:
Radius bridges developer and operator workflows by enabling cloud-neutral application deployment with infrastructure recipes and Dapr integration that simplify building, configuring, and managing modern cloud applications across platforms

➜ https://ku.bz/8-0fkjpFQ
summary: Radius platform highlights Dapr integration for cloud apps

author: Chase Million (@millionconcepts.com)
text:
A. Triage is not rejection before review. It gets reviewed.

Q. I really like DAPR. But for some things, it doesn't make sense. (e.g. When it's just going to be obvious where things are from.) [Agree.] A. DAPR is default at SMD. There is a waiver, but it's difficult.
summary: Discusses NASA SMD DAPR data policy, not Dapr runtime

author: Chase Million (@millionconcepts.com)
text:
Summary of Cycle 1 "selectables."

272 proposals submitted for Cycle 2.

Reminders: Science-PI is to get around institutional PI rules. Answer questions accurately. Proposals are DAPR. Volunteer to review.
summary: NASA proposal process mentions DAPR policy, not Dapr runtime
